sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM and purchase data for detector assemblies, PBAs, panel, power, battery, accessories, component specifications, suppliers, and costs.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR design and purchasing traceability for detector hardware configuration and supplied components.
keyPoints: S4343-W entries include PBA INTERFACE MAIN, power box, battery, recharger accessories, and detailed electronic components.
HAD1717MC entries include middle, module, front, back cover, panel, power box, accessory, packaging, main PBA, gate PBA, and ROIC PBA assemblies.
PCB revisions are explicitly listed for HAD1717MC as ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB, ADI_GATE_V006_PCB, and ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB.
Safety- or compliance-relevant parts include Li-ion polymer battery, power box/SMPS, EMI filter, fuse, TVS, PTC thermistors, AC cables, and grounding-related fasteners.

entities.name: S4343-W
entities.evidence: Rows repeatedly begin with S4343-W and list PBA INTERFACE MAIN, POWER BOX, BATTERY, and ACCESSORY modules.

entities.name: HAD1717MC
entities.evidence: Rows list HAD1717MC with MIDDLE ASSY, MODULE ASSY, FRONT ASSY, BACK COVER ASSY, PANEL ASSY, POWER BOX, ACCESSORY, and PBA assemblies.

entities.name: ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB
entities.evidence: HAD1717MC MAIN PBA entry lists ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB with FR4 12L, 240mm x 130mm x 1.6T, Green, gold plating, V006.

entities.name: ADI_GATE_V006_PCB
entities.evidence: HAD1717MC GATE PBA entry lists ADI_GATE_V006_PCB with FR4 4L, 402.5mm x 32.5mm x 1.0T, V006.

entities.name: ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB
entities.evidence: HAD1717MC ROIC PBA entry lists ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB with FR4 8L, 427mm x 39mm x 1.0T, V007.

entities.name: 1717 PANEL MODULE_CsI
entities.evidence: HAD1717MC PANEL ASSY lists AA1-000003 as 1717 PANEL MODULE_CsI.

entities.name: TFT Panel_17X17
entities.evidence: HAD1717MC PANEL ASSY lists F-BG-0101, TFT Panel_17X17, described as 17*17 BOE Panel.

entities.name: CsI
entities.evidence: PANEL ASSY line lists CsI as Cesium Iodide 99.999 pure with code 42404.

entities.name: SDB-3S1PA
entities.evidence: S4343-W BATTERY entry lists SDR-C4335W, Li-ion Polymer, 3400mAh, 130x245x8.5mm, -0to60C, 380g, model SDB-3S1PA.

entities.name: MEANWELL RPS200-15
entities.evidence: HAD1717MC POWER BOX entry lists SMPS, MEANWELL / RPS200-15.

entities.name: BNX022-01L
entities.evidence: S4343-W PBA INTERFACE MAIN lists FILTER-EMI SMD, 50V, 10A, 1000000pF, BNX022-01L.

concepts.name: Detector BOM purchasing traceability
concepts.evidence: Rows combine model, assembly, part number, quantity, description, manufacturer/supplier, currency, unit price, and total price.

concepts.name: Safety-related electrical protection components
concepts.evidence: Chunk includes EMI filter BNX022-01L, TVS SMCJ16CA, fuse 0451 005_SMD, and PTC thermistors MINISMDC020F/MINISMDC300F.

concepts.name: Panel and scintillator configuration
concepts.evidence: HAD1717MC PANEL ASSY lists 1717 PANEL MODULE_CsI, TFT Panel_17X17, CsI Cesium Iodide 99.999 pure, readout ICs, and gate ICs.

concepts.name: PCB revision control
concepts.evidence: Main, gate, and ROIC PBA rows identify PCB names with V006 or V007 revision markers.

evidence.claim: The chunk identifies S4343-W as a detector hardware configuration with PBA interface main, power box, battery, and accessory modules.
evidence.evidenceText: S4343-W rows include PBA INTERFACE MAIN, POWER BOX, BATTERY, and ACCESSORY entries.

evidence.claim: The chunk identifies HAD1717MC as a product model with multiple mechanical, panel, power, accessory, packaging, and PBA assemblies.
evidence.evidenceText: HAD1717MC rows list MIDDLE ASSY, MODULE ASSY, FRONT ASSY, BACK COVER ASSY, PANEL ASSY, POWER BOX, ACCESSORY, packaging, MAIN PBA, GATE PBA, and ROIC PBA.

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC uses a 1717 CsI panel assembly including a BOE 17x17 TFT panel.
evidence.evidenceText: PANEL ASSY lists AA1-000003 1717 PANEL MODULE_CsI and F-BG-0101 TFT Panel_17X17, 17*17 BOE Panel.

evidence.claim: The scintillator material for the HAD1717MC panel assembly is cesium iodide of 99.999 purity.
evidence.evidenceText: PANEL ASSY lists CsI as Cesium Iodide 99.999 pure with code 42404.

evidence.claim: The HAD1717MC main PBA PCB is identified as revision V006.
evidence.evidenceText: MAIN PBA lists ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB, FR4 12L_240mm x 130mm x 1.6T(Green) 금도금,유광 V006.

evidence.claim: The HAD1717MC gate PBA PCB is identified as revision V006.
evidence.evidenceText: GATE PBA lists ADI_GATE_V006_PCB, FR4 4L_402.5mm x 32.5mm x 1.0T(Green) 금도금, 유광 V006.

evidence.claim: The HAD1717MC ROIC PBA PCB is identified as revision V007.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC PBA lists ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB, FR4 8L_427mm x 39mm x 1.0T(Green) 금도금, 유광 V007.

evidence.claim: The S4343-W battery is a Li-ion polymer battery with 3400 mAh capacity and 0 to 60 C operating range.
evidence.evidenceText: BATTERY entry lists SDR-C4335W, Li-ion Polymer, 3400mAh, 130x245x8.5mm, -0to60C, 380g, SDB-3S1PA.

evidence.claim: The S4343-W power box PBA outputs 5.8 V, 30 V, and -15 V from a 16 V input.
evidence.evidenceText: POWER BOX entry lists PBA POWER, S4335-W POWER PBA, INPUT(16V), OUTPUT(5.8V, 30V,-15V).

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC power box includes a MEANWELL RPS200-15 SMPS.
evidence.evidenceText: POWER BOX entry lists SMPS, MEANWELL / RPS200-15.

evidence.claim: The BOM includes EMI filtering for the S4343-W PBA interface main.
evidence.evidenceText: PBA INTERFACE MAIN lists FILTER-EMI SMD, 50V, 10A, 1000000pF, BNX022-01L, Korea Murata Electronics.

evidence.claim: The HAD1717MC main PBA includes cybersecurity- or software-relevant processing and storage components.
evidence.evidenceText: MAIN PBA lists IC_CPU iMX6S/MCIMX6S5DVM10AC, IC_DRAM K4B2G1646Q-BCK0, IC_Flash_Drive SDIN7DU2-8G, AR8031, and CP2103.

evidence.claim: The HAD1717MC accessory set includes LAN CAT6 cable, AC cables, trigger cable, and main data cables.
evidence.evidenceText: ACCESSORY entries list LAN CAT6 Cable(5M), 220V AC Cable(1.5M), 110V AC Cable(1.5M), Trigger Cable, and Main Data Cable variants.

evidence.claim: Some BOM items carry lead-time or discontinuation review notes.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows include notes such as 납기 5개월 이상, 단종확인필요, LPS4018-222ML 단종=>LPS4018-222MR 변경, and SDIN7DU2-8G => 단종.

reviewFlags.reason: The spreadsheet chunk contains many #REF! and #N/A cells, so some calculated pricing, references, or linked identifiers may be broken.
No regulatory authority, certificate, submission number, or formal standard is stated in this chunk.
Several component rows include discontinuation or lead-time notes, including 납기 5개월 이상 and 단종 references, which may affect DMR procurement control.
